ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "provider_number" TEXT /* Provider number assigned to the hospital */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated hospital */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readmission_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readmission metric record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated hospital */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure being assessed */,
  "number_of_discharges" INTEGER /* Total number of discharges for the measure */,
  "excess_readmission_ratio" REAL /* Excess readmission ratio for the hospital */,
  "predicted_readmission_rate" REAL /* Predicted readmission rate for the measure */,
  "expected_readmission_rate" REAL /* Expected readmission rate for the measure */,
  "number_of_readmissions" INTEGER /* Total number of readmissions for the measure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readmission_metrics_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure being assessed */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_readmission_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated readmission metric record */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "readmission_rate" REAL /* Readmission rate for the quarter */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay for the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_readmission_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES readmission_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated hospital */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated readmission metric record */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was generated */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., high readmission rate alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES readmission_metrics ("metric_id")
)
